prompt: Design a responsive product showcase where the visual hierarchy relies entirely on the interplay between a large, expressive display font and crisp body text, utilizing generous whitespace and subtle micro-interactions to highlight the tactile quality of handmade pottery without relying on decorative stock imagery. Use the existing Vue 3 and Tailwind setup, overwriting the default utility-first baseline with bespoke stylistic rules that give the page a distinct, non-templated character.
